comment:
Пусть \(k=9^x-2\cdot 3^x\), тогда:
$$k^2-62k-63\geq 0\\ (k-63)(k+1)\geq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
k\leq -1\\
k\geq 63
\end{array} \right.$$
Сделаем обратную замену:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
9^{x} -2\cdotp 3^{x} \leq -1\\
\ 9^{x} -2\cdotp 3^{x} \geq 63
\end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\ 3^{2x} -2\cdotp 3^{x} +1\leq 0\\
3^{2x} -2\cdotp 3^{x} -63\geq 0
\end{array} \right.$$
Сделаем замену:
$$t=3^x$$
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\ t^{2} -2t+1\leq 0\\
t^{2} -2t-63\geq 0
\end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\ \ \ \ ( t-1)^{2} \leq 0\\
( t-9)( t+7) \geq 0
\end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\ t=1\\
t\leq -7\\
\ t\geq 9
\end{array} \right.$$
Сделаем обратную замену:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\ \ 3^{x} =1\\
3^{x} \leq -7\\
\ \ 3^{x} \geq 9
\end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
x=0\\
\ \ \ \emptyset \\
x\geq 2
\end{array} \right.$$
Значит:
\(x\in\){\(0\)}\(\cup [2;+\infty )\).
Ответ: {\(0\)}\(\cup [2;+\infty )\).
